message:
chore(beads): record BufferView slice overflow hardening task (frankenjax-xjpu)

Multi-pass bug hunt surfaced an integer-overflow / wrap risk in
crates/fj-runtime/src/buffer.rs::BufferView::slice — the function
computes offset + len before validating bounds, so adversarial or
saturated usize inputs can panic in debug or wrap in release before
the subsequent slice expression fires.

Add frankenjax-xjpu (Harden BufferView slice range overflow,
priority 2, type bug, status in_progress) capturing the diagnosis
and the planned fix shape: replace the addition with checked_add so
out-of-range or overflowing slices return None per the documented
contract, plus a usize::MAX regression test asserting BufferView::slice
is panic-free and returns None.

Beads-only commit — no source change here. The acceptance gates
(rch cargo test/check/clippy on fj-runtime, cargo fmt --check, ubs
on touched file) are recorded in the issue body so the implementing
agent can pick it up directly from br ready.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
